author: Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP
rev_p_summary: Rev P completes the cargo bay system on the Rev O CG-pivot tiltrotor baseline. Changes from Rev O: (1) s_cargo_sect_shell24.scad updated to Rev S with 100×90 mm belly clamshell door opening at station 165..330 mm; 2× hinge-pin blocks (3.3 mm bore + M3 grub-screw), 2× SG90 servo mount pads (4× M2.5 pilots each), 4× latch-catch lips (Z=42/122 mm at each frame edge); (2) port and starboard CF-PETG clamshell doors added (cargo_door_port/stbd.stl), generated by generate_cargo_doors.py via bilinear interpolation from belly hull faces; each door hinged on 3 mm CF rod via 8-barrel piano hinge bossed into hull flanges (PR #22 2026-06-01); (3) two SG90 micro servos added for door actuation and payload release, driven via DRV8833 dual H-bridge breakout on cargo_drv8833_tray.stl; (4) N20 winch spool redesigned (cargo_winch_spool.stl) with Dyneema SK75 0.5 mm braided line; (5) cargo cradle updated to auto-latch (cargo_cradle_autolatch.stl); (6) GPS retention ring and FPV bezel added for payload bay instrumentation; (7) 3M foam gasket tape seals door mating flanges. All other subsystems (propulsion, avionics, tilt mechanism, gear train, comms, security) are identical to Rev O. Total AUW impact: +~58 g (cargo doors + hardware); total cost impact: +~$23.

hull_geometry.fill: 2 lb/ft³ (32 kg/m³) two-part closed-cell polyurethane foam, 4× expansion
hull_geometry.nacelle_od: ~60.5 mm (X) × 67 mm (Y) — bore inscribed ID ≈ 55.5 mm
hull_geometry.nacelle_length: 148.3 mm (Z axis, Z=0 = intake face, Z=148.3 = nozzle exit face)

print_schedule.desc: Cockpit / nose section
Fuselage mid-section — canonical Serenity belly geometry, NO belly scoop. Replaces s_middle_intake_shell24.stl for Rev N/O 4-radial-intake build.
print_schedule.notes: Generate STL from SCAD with OpenSCAD CLI: openscad -o s_middle_canonical_shell24.stl serenity/stl/s_middle_canonical_shell24.scad

print_schedule.desc: Cargo section — Rev S shell with clamshell door cutout and servo mounts
print_schedule.notes: Rev S (2026-06-01): belly opening 100×90 mm at station 165..330 mm (axial 165 mm span); 2× hinge-pin blocks (3.3 mm bore + M3 grub-screw tap) at port/stbd flanges; 2× SG90 servo mount pads (4× M2.5 pilot holes each); 4× latch-catch lips at Z=42 mm and Z=122 mm per frame edge. Mass ~15 g less than Rev O shell due to door opening cutout. Regenerate from updated SCAD before slicing.

print_schedule.desc: Rear fuselage / engine bell section with 4 radial scoop windows at neck station (~310 mm from nose). 4 rectangular cutouts (65 mm wide × 60 mm axial) at 90° spacing (dorsal/port/ventral/stbd). Canonical shell geometry otherwise preserved.
print_schedule.notes: Generate STL from SCAD. Verify scoop-window station alignment in slicer before printing; adjust NECK_X parameter if needed.

print_schedule.desc: CF-PETG structural intake frame ring — bonds into 4 scoop windows at neck station. Provides aerodynamic intake lips, registration tongues (5 mm), bonding shoulders (5 mm), and internal duct arms routing air toward plenum. Replaces structural stiffness lost by cutting hull openings.
print_schedule.notes: Print with hardened-steel nozzle. Bond with structural epoxy (e.g. West System 105/206) into hull scoop cutouts. Cure 24 h before foam-fill.

print_schedule.desc: PETG 4-to-1 cross-shaped plenum manifold — collects air from 4 intake frame duct arms (station ~310 mm) and delivers to 120 mm EDF fan face (station ~430 mm). Rectangular arms (65×60 mm) taper to 120 mm circular EDF outlet over 80 mm transition length.
print_schedule.notes: Bond aft end to EDF mount ring; bond forward arm ends to intake frame duct arm exits. Seal all joints with epoxy fillet. Pressure-test with shop vac before closing hull.

print_schedule.desc: Wing pair (both sides, one print)
Port nacelle with integrated CW stator (SWIRL_DIR=+1) — Rev O, generated by blender_nacelle_revo.py OR openscad -D SWIRL_DIR=1 nacelle_pod_50mm_tandem.scad
print_schedule.notes: Rev O: pivot at Z=83 mm (CG). EDF bore ID≈55 mm; 11-fin twisted stator Z=75..95 mm; clevis MF104ZZ × 2; M=1.0 gear bosses at Z=83 mm and Z=133 mm. Print with hardened-steel nozzle.

print_schedule.desc: Starboard nacelle with integrated CCW stator (SWIRL_DIR=−1) — Rev O, mirror image of port nacelle
print_schedule.notes: Rev O: openscad -D SWIRL_DIR=-1. CCW stator cancels port torque reaction. Same CG pivot at Z=83 mm.

print_schedule.desc: Nacelle pivot housing outer — updated for Rev O MF104ZZ bearing at Z=83 mm
Pivot pin holders
Tilt piston linkage (decorative / fairing)
Pivot arm — carries tilt servo pushrod
Nacelle iris nozzle petal (50 mm EDF, hull-matched outer surface) — redesigned for M=1.0 crown-pinion rack in Rev O
print_schedule.notes: 8 per nacelle × 2 nacelles; print flat; inner concave face print in translucent-blue PETG for LED backlight effect. SCAD: nacelle_nozzle_iris.scad

print_schedule.desc: Nacelle iris base ring (fixed, seats at nozzle exit face) — M=1.0 internal rack for crown pinion in Rev O
print_schedule.notes: Rev O: M=1.0 internal rack tooth profile on inner ring (R_eff=28 mm). SCAD: nacelle_nozzle_iris.scad

print_schedule.desc: Rear fuselage iris nozzle petal (120 mm EDF, 38° span)
print_schedule.notes: Inner face: translucent-blue PETG for LED backlight

print_schedule.desc: Rear nozzle base ring with 8 fixed ribs (one-piece cone frame, visible at all petal states)
Landing gear feet (×4 in one STL)
Landing gear legs
Port clamshell cargo door — CF-PETG, bilinear-interpolated from belly hull faces
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #22 2026-06-01). Generated by generate_cargo_doors.py (trimesh/scipy bilinear interpolation from Rev O belly faces). Outer surface blends into adjacent hull skin. 8-barrel piano hinge tab on aft edge; 3 mm CF rod bore 3.15 mm; inner face has 2×2 mm foam gasket channel. Print with hardened-steel nozzle.

print_schedule.desc: Starboard clamshell cargo door — CF-PETG, mirror of port door
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #22 2026-06-01). Mirror of cargo_door_port.stl. Print in same orientation with supports on hinge tab. Watertight geometry verified.

print_schedule.desc: N20 winch motor mount — CF-PETG cantilevered bracket on forward cargo bulkhead
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). Accepts N20 motor body (10×12 mm cross-section); 2× M2.5 SHCS clamp bolts; 4× M3 heat-set inserts for forward cargo frame attachment; aligns spool bore to hull centreline ±1 mm.

print_schedule.desc: Dyneema winch spool — PETG, 4-start helical groove OD=26 mm for 0.5 mm Dyneema
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). 4-start helical groove at 0.6 mm pitch for Dyneema SK75 0.5 mm; hub bore 3 mm for N20 output shaft; OD=26 mm; PETG acceptable (max line tension ~8 N well below PETG yield).

print_schedule.desc: Cargo door SG90 servo bracket — CF-PETG, mounts to port inner hull rib via M2.5 screws
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). SG90 servo body pocket + 2× M2 screw retention holes; pushrod slot guides 1 mm music wire to door cam; CF-PETG for rigidity under door inertia load.

print_schedule.desc: Cargo release SG90 servo bracket — CF-PETG, mounts to starboard inner hull rib
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). Mirrors door servo bracket geometry. Drives cradle pull-wire for payload release via 1 mm music wire in 2 mm PTFE guide tube to latch tab.

print_schedule.desc: DRV8833 breakout tray — PETG friction-fit pocket in starboard forward cargo frame
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). Holds DRV8833 breakout PCB (23×19 mm); 4× snap tabs; JST-PH 2 mm connector cutout on long edge; 3 mm clearance from frame wall for thermal dissipation.

print_schedule.desc: Cargo payload cradle with auto-latch mechanism — PETG
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). Payload press-to-lock auto-latch; spring-loaded lever (0.5 mm SS spring wire); pull-wire release from release servo (cargo_release_servo_bracket.stl); compatible with 50×50×30 mm+ payload footprint; rated hold 5 N minimum.

print_schedule.desc: GPS patch antenna retention ring — PETG, bonds to closed door inner face
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). 25 mm dia opening aligned to GPS patch footprint; 3 mm lip catches antenna PCB edge; PETG acceptable — non-structural, non-RF-attenuating.

print_schedule.desc: FPV camera bezel — PETG, mounts on forward cargo bay bulkhead, pointing down at payload
print_schedule.notes: Rev P new (PR #21 2026-05-30). 28 mm dia FOV cutout; accepts standard 28 mm M12 lens FPV module; 4× M2 mounting screws to forward bulkhead; camera cable routes to Cape-B MIPI/USB.

nacelle_edfs.desc: 50 mm EDF unit @ 6S — 4 total (2 per nacelle, tandem series)
nacelle_edfs.config: 2 per nacelle in tandem/series — single shared bore, EDF1 upstream Z=22..72 mm, EDF2 downstream Z=98..143 mm
nacelle_edfs.rotation: Port nacelle: CW from intake | Starboard nacelle: CCW from intake (counter-rotating pair for zero net torque)
nacelle_edfs.notes: Verify rotation direction before installing in nacelle. Spin-test on bench first.

nacelle_escs.desc: 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC with BDSHOT telemetry — one per 50 mm EDF
nacelle_escs.notes: ESC1/ESC2 in port nacelle hub bore; ESC3/ESC4 in starboard. Route leads through integrated hub bore (ID=20 mm).

nacelle_stators.desc: 11-fin twisted inter-stage stator — integral to nacelle shell print (CF-PETG), not a separate part. Rev O: stator at Z=75..95 mm, 11 fins, 33° vane angle.
nacelle_stators.notes: Generated by blender_nacelle_revo.py OR nacelle_pod_50mm_tandem.scad. 11-fin count chosen for mutual prime with 6-pole EDF motor (11 × 6 = 66 — avoids tonal resonance).

rear_edf.desc: 120 mm EDF unit @ 6S — rear fuselage inside engine bell, exhaust straight aft
rear_edf.location: Panel F engine bell, fan face at station ~430 mm from nose. Axis aligned with fuselage centreline, intake forward (+Z toward nose).
rear_edf.intake: 4 radial scoops at station ~310 mm via s_neck_intake_frame + s_aft_edf_plenum (replaces belly scoop).
rear_edf.notes: Fan annular area ≈10,683 mm²; combined scoop capture area = 15,600 mm² (ratio 1.46× — exceeds 1.3× minimum for duct velocity matching). Verify EDF ring / plenum outlet concentricity before bonding.

rear_esc.desc: 80A 6S BLHeli32 ESC for 120 mm rear EDF

thrust_summary.dry_mass_g: ~2858 (estimated — hull prints + avionics + motors + servos + cargo hardware, excl. battery)
thrust_summary.tw_ratio: ~1.47 at 6S 4000 mAh (Rev P cargo hardware +58 g vs Rev O)
thrust_summary.notes: Rev P adds ~58 g cargo hardware vs Rev O; T/W remains adequate for stable hover and cargo ops.

nacelle_tilt_servos.desc: Nacelle tilt servo — fuselage mounted, one per nacelle
nacelle_tilt_servos.type: Digital, metal gear (e.g. DS3218MG class or equivalent ≥25 kg·cm at 6V)
nacelle_tilt_servos.notes: Rev O: Servo torque demand greatly reduced by CG-pivot at Z=83 mm. At any tilt angle, gravity exerts zero net moment on the nacelle. Servo now only overcomes aerodynamic and inertia moments.

nozzle_gear_linkage.desc: Passive mechanical linkage — nacelle nozzle driven by tilt pivot, no dedicated servo. Rev O: M=1.0 gears throughout.
nozzle_gear_linkage.mechanism: Sector gear (R=22 mm, M=1.0, fixed to tilt bracket) → Drive Pinion A (N=12T, R=6 mm, on nacelle body at PIVOT_Z) → longitudinal 3 mm CF shaft in conduit → M=1.0 Bevel pair (N=14T, 45° pitch cone, 90° axis redirect) → Crown Pinion (N=12T, R=6 mm) → Nozzle inner ring rack (M=1.0, R_eff=28 mm)
nozzle_gear_linkage.gear_ratio: Sector:pinion = 22/6 = 3.667:1 × bevel 1:1 × crown:rack = 6/28 = 0.214 → effective 0.786 nozzle-deg per nacelle-deg
nozzle_gear_linkage.nozzle_state: 0° nacelle → nozzle fully closed (hull-matched petal surface); 90° nacelle → nozzle ~70.7° ring rotation = fully open
nozzle_gear_linkage.nozzle_120deg: At 120° nacelle, nozzle ring would be over-driven — internal hard stop in ring gear limits ring to 70.7° max.

pivot_bearings.desc: MF104ZZ flanged bearing 4×10×4 mm — nacelle pivot (2 per nacelle). Rev O: confirmed selection; replaces v1 686ZZ (6 mm ID).
pivot_bearings.notes: Press-fit into CLEVIS_EAR_OD=16 mm bore; pivot rod = 4 mm CF (CF-ROD-4MM)

pivot_rod.desc: 4 mm OD solid carbon-fibre pivot rod, cut to length per pivot housing drawing

sector_gear.desc: M=1.0 sector gear R=22 mm, 38T arc, 155° arc span — fixed to tilt bracket (fuselage side).

bevel_pair.desc: M=1.0 bevel gear pair N=14T each, 45° pitch cone, 1:1 ratio, 90° axis redirect.

pinion.desc: M=1.0 drive and crown pinions, N=12T, R=6 mm.

nacelle_nozzles.desc: 2× iris nozzles (one per nacelle) — gear-driven passively from tilt pivot, NO dedicated servo.
nacelle_nozzles.hinge_pins: 3 mm diameter × 5 mm stainless steel, one per petal
nacelle_nozzles.link_ring: Piano wire 0.8 mm bent to link ring connecting petals to nozzle inner ring
nacelle_nozzles.petal_material: PETG body + translucent-blue PETG inner face

rear_nozzle.desc: 1× iris nozzle (rear 120 mm EDF) — servo actuated
rear_nozzle.petals: 8 moving petals + 8 fixed ribs (integral to rear_nozzle_frame.stl)
rear_nozzle.hinge_pins: 3 mm diameter × 5 mm stainless steel, one per petal

servo.desc: Rear nozzle servo — SG90 class or equivalent (small load)
servo.notes: Mount inside rear fuselage section adjacent to 120 mm EDF duct. Piano wire pushrod to nozzle ring.

hinge_pins_total.desc: 3 mm OD × 5 mm stainless steel roll pin or solid pin
hinge_pins_total.notes: 16 for nacelle petals (8×2) + 8 for rear petals

led_rings.desc: WS2812B LED ring (addressable RGB) — inside each nozzle duct for backlight effect
led_rings.notes: One per nozzle (2 nacelle + 1 rear). Inner petal face printed in translucent-blue PETG; LED ring mounts at duct exit lip.

components.desc: M=1.0 sector gear R=22 mm — fixed to tilt bracket, NOT rotating with nacelle
components.notes: Fixed to tilt bracket (fuselage side); nacelle Pinion A rolls along this arc during tilt

components.desc: M=1.0 Drive Pinion A — N=12T, R=6 mm, on nacelle exterior at pivot Z
M=1.0 bevel gear pair — N=14T each, 45° pitch cone, 1:1 ratio, 90° axis redirect
components.material: Resin SLA (SDP-SI or similar commercial preferred)
components.notes: 2 gears (A=transverse + B=longitudinal) per nacelle, 2 nacelles = 4 total

components.desc: M=1.0 Crown Pinion — N=12T, R=6 mm, drives nozzle ring rack
Bevel gear housing block — CF-PETG, mounts to inboard nacelle boss posts
3 mm OD solid CF rod for gear shafts — cut to length (transverse + longitudinal per nacelle)
components.lengths_mm: 2× 22 mm transverse (Pinion A + Bevel A), 1× 52 mm longitudinal (Bevel B to Crown)

components.desc: MR63ZZ miniature ball bearing 3×6×2.5 mm — gear shaft bearings
PTFE tube 4 mm OD × 3 mm ID — longitudinal shaft sleeve inside conduit (52 mm per nacelle)

avionics.note: Avionics hardware identical to Rev O. All 8 PocketBeagle 2 Industrial (AM6254) nodes with Cape-A (FC nodes) and Cape-B (CN nodes).

nodes.desc: Cape-A PCB 85×55 mm — Sensor + FC cape
Cape-B PCB 90×60 mm — Comms + Logging + Payload cape

RCRS-49 sub-module PCB — 49 MHz TDDS RC. Antenna: top wire running dorsal hull spine from nose post (~120 mm) to EDF cone post (~600 mm), ~470 mm wire length, base-loaded (38 uH coil + LC pi-net at nose post), CF keel bar counterpoise.
64 GB microSD — Cape-B write-blocked flight log

bay_assignments.bay_A: CN1 (Cape-B, lower) + FC1 (Cape-A, upper) — nose section, ~X=0..91 mm
bay_assignments.bay_B: CN2 (Cape-B, lower) + FC2 (Cape-A, upper) — mid-forward, ~X=91..165 mm
bay_assignments.bay_D: CN3 (Cape-B, lower) + FC3 (Cape-A, upper) — mid-aft, ~X=251..320 mm
bay_assignments.bay_E: CN4 (Cape-B, lower) + FC4 (Cape-A, upper) — aft service, ~X=320..388 mm

antenna_system.desc: 49 MHz top wire — 0.3 mm stainless steel, ~470 mm, dorsal spine
antenna_system.search: Stainless steel wire 0.3 mm dia 1 m spool
antenna_system.notes: End-fed shortened wire; horizontal polarisation; cross-pol loss ~6–12 dB at ≤300 m acceptable

antenna_system.desc: Forward wire post + base-loading coil — PETG post + 38 uH coil + LC pi-net at dorsal hull ~120 mm from nose
antenna_system.search: 38 uH air-core inductor + variable cap + PETG printed post
antenna_system.notes: 3 mm clearance from GPS patch face; bench-test HDOP ≤1.5 with RCRS TX active before first flight

antenna_system.desc: Aft wire post + ceramic bead insulator — top of rear nozzle cone ~600 mm from nose
antenna_system.search: Ceramic standoff insulator 3 mm + PETG post
antenna_system.notes: Strain-relief wire at aft post; open-circuit (insulated) termination

battery_hover.notes: Primary flight battery. C-rating ≥15C continuous for peak draw (~60A).

battery_cargo.notes: Use when payload ≤250 g and flight time can be reduced.

distribution.avionics_bus: 5V BEC from main bus — 8 PB2-I nodes + capes + servos
distribution.servo_bus: 6V regulated from 6S BEC — nacelle tilt servos + rear nozzle servo
distribution.cargo_bus: 5V from avionics BEC — DRV8833 cargo controller + 2× SG90 cargo servos
distribution.led_bus: 5V from BEC — WS2812B LED rings (3× nozzle backlight)
distribution.bec_spec: ≥5A dual BEC (5V + 6V output) on main power distribution board

wiring.main_leads: 10AWG silicone — battery to PDB and ESC inputs
wiring.esc_motor: 16AWG silicone — each ESC to EDF motor
wiring.signal: 28AWG shielded twisted pair for servo signal + DSHOT leads
wiring.data_bus: PTFE 3 mm ID conduit, full hull length, for CAN FD / RS-485 / 1553 / ETH
wiring.cargo_signal: 28AWG 3-core silicone — Cape-B GPIO to DRV8833 tray (PWM + DIR + GND); ~250 mm run

keel.notes: Runs full hull length; datum marks at 91, 165, 251, 320, 388 mm from nose

spars.desc: Carbon-fibre tube 12 mm OD × 1.5 mm wall
spars.length_mm: 2× 350 mm (wing spar through wing root to fuselage)

ring_frames.desc: 2 mm CF plate, 5 station profiles (91, 165, 251, 320, 388 mm from nose)

foam_fill.spec: 2 lb/ft³ (32 kg/m³) two-part closed-cell polyurethane, 4× expansion ratio
foam_fill.volume_l: ~0.7 L mixed (fills hull void after EPS void formers placed for bays + cargo)
foam_fill.notes: Provides structural rigidity, crash absorption, and near-neutral buoyancy. Do NOT foam the nacelle interior or open cargo bay section.

cargo.bay_opening_mm: 100 × 90 mm (port-to-stbd width × depth) at station 165..330 mm from nose (axial span 165 mm)
cargo.bay_usable_mm: ~90 × 80 × 135 mm (interior clearance with doors closed — accounting for door skin thickness and cradle footprint)

door_mechanism.type: Clamshell — port and starboard CF-PETG doors (cargo_door_port/stbd.stl)
door_mechanism.hinge: 8-barrel piano hinge, 3 mm CF rod bore (3.15 mm) in hull flange hinge-pin blocks
door_mechanism.hinge_rod: 3 mm CF rod × 165 mm, one per door; cut from SHAFT-CF-3MM stock
door_mechanism.seal: 3M foam gasket tape 2×2 mm in door mating flange grooves; dust and weather seal
door_mechanism.actuation: SG90 micro servo per door (Ch-A = port door open/close); cam-driven via 1 mm music wire pushrod; lever arm ~30 mm → ~0.5 N push at 1.8 kg·cm rated at 5V
door_mechanism.controller: DRV8833 dual H-bridge breakout on cargo_drv8833_tray.stl; Ch-A = door SG90, Ch-B = release SG90
door_mechanism.control_node: CN node (Cape-B) GPIO PWM + DIR; door-open commanded via CAN FD from elected FC master

winch.spool: cargo_winch_spool.stl — PETG, 4-start helical groove, OD=26 mm, accepts 0.5 mm Dyneema SK75
winch.line: Dyneema SK75 0.5 mm braid × 2 m (REF: DYNEEMA-SK75); rated break ~300 N; WLL ~60 N (5:1 SF), well above 400 g payload load of ~4 N
winch.load_cell: HX711 24-bit ADC (REF: HX711-LC) — tension monitoring; soft-limits via Cape-B firmware

payload_retention.cradle: cargo_cradle_autolatch.stl — PETG auto-latch: payload presses latch tab to lock, release servo pull-wire unlocks
payload_retention.release_servo: SG90 (SERVO-CARGO Ch-B) via DRV8833 Ch-B; bracket: cargo_release_servo_bracket.stl

instrumentation.gps_retention: cargo_gps_retention_ring.stl — PETG, 25 mm dia opening aligned to GPS patch; bonds to closed door inner face
instrumentation.fpv_camera: cargo_fpv_bezel.stl — PETG, 28 mm dia cutout on forward cargo bay bulkhead; camera points down at payload; connects to Cape-B MIPI/USB

cargo_electronics.desc: SG90 9g micro servo — cargo door actuation (1×) + payload release (1×)
cargo_electronics.notes: Ch-A servo = door cam; Ch-B servo = latch pull-wire release; both driven via DRV8833 H-bridge controlled by Cape-B GPIO

cargo_electronics.desc: DRV8833 dual H-bridge motor driver breakout — controls 2× SG90 cargo servos
cargo_electronics.search: DRV8833 dual H-bridge motor driver breakout board
cargo_electronics.notes: Treats SG90 servos as DC motors in position control; over-current protection prevents door-jam damage; mounts in cargo_drv8833_tray.stl; controlled via Cape-B GPIO

cargo_hardware.desc: Dyneema SK75 0.5 mm braided line × 2 m — cargo winch spool line
cargo_hardware.search: Dyneema SK75 0.5 mm braided fishing line 100 m spool
cargo_hardware.notes: Buy 100 m spool and cut 2 m; remainder useful for structural lashing and safety tethers; WLL ~60 N (5:1 SF) — adequate for 400 g payload at 1 g = 4 N

cargo_hardware.desc: 3M foam gasket tape 2×2 mm — cargo door mating flange weather seal
cargo_hardware.search: 3M foam double-sided tape 2 mm wide closed-cell weatherseal
cargo_hardware.notes: Applied to 2×2 mm door flange groove; dust and moisture seal; max compression 50% — do not overtighten latch; replace if adhesion fails after repeated door cycles

totals.print_time_est_h: ~65–90 h across all parts (Rev P adds ~5–10 h cargo prints vs Rev O)
totals.filament_petg_g: ~1460 g (Rev O ~1400 g + ~54 g Rev P cargo PETG prints)
totals.filament_cfpetg_g: ~755 g (Rev O ~620 g + ~135 g Rev P cargo CF-PETG prints — 1 spool 750 g is tight; have second spool on hand)
totals.servo_breakdown: 2× nacelle tilt (≥25 kg·cm metal gear) + 1× rear nozzle (SG90-class) + 2× cargo door/release (SG90) — Rev P adds 2 cargo SG90 servos vs Rev O 3 servos

cost_estimate_usd.hull_filament: ~$93 (Rev O $85 + ~$8 extra CF-PETG for cargo prints)
cost_estimate_usd.notes: Rev P adds ~$23 vs Rev O ($1,882). Component prices as of 2026-06-01. Excludes one-time tools. Printed cargo parts ($0 marginal cost for in-house prints) not included in cost delta beyond filament.
